content.text:
{
  "trigger_method": [
    "org.jsoup.nodes.ElementTest::testSetHtml",
    "org.jsoup.nodes.ElementTest::testWrap",
    "org.jsoup.nodes.ElementTest::before",
    "org.jsoup.nodes.ElementTest::after",
    "org.jsoup.nodes.ElementTest::testSetHtmlTitle"
  ],
  "fixed_code": [
    "public static boolean isValid(String bodyHtml, Whitelist whitelist) {\n        return new Cleaner(whitelist).isValid(parseBodyFragment(bodyHtml, \"\"));\n    }",
    "public static List<Node> parseFragment(String fragmentHtml, Element context, String baseUri) {\n        Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser();\n        return parser.parseFragmentInput(fragmentHtml, context, baseUri, ParseErrorList.noTracking());\n    }",
    "public boolean isValid(Document dirtyDocument) {\n        Validate.notNull(dirtyDocument);\n\n        Document clean = Document.createShell(dirtyDocument.baseUri());\n        int numDiscarded = copySafeNodes(dirtyDocument.body(), clean.body());\n        return numDiscarded == 0;\n    }"
  ]
}
